allow:
Bash(timeout 15 bash -c 'DEMO_TASKS=3 ./bin/master &
MASTER_PID=$!
sleep 2
./bin/worker 127.0.0.1 9090 1 &
W1=$!
sleep 10
kill $MASTER_PID $W1 2>/dev/null
wait $MASTER_PID $W1 2>/dev/null
')

Bash(timeout 15 bash -c '
MASTER_PORT=19191 DEMO_TASKS=3 ./bin/master &
MASTER_PID=$!
sleep 2
MASTER_PORT=19191 ./bin/worker 127.0.0.1 19191 1 &
W1=$!
sleep 10
kill $MASTER_PID $W1 2>/dev/null
wait $MASTER_PID $W1 2>/dev/null
')

Bash(timeout 15 bash -c '
MASTER_PORT=19191 DEMO_TASKS=3 ./bin/master > /tmp/master.log 2>&1 &
MASTER_PID=$!
sleep 2
./bin/worker 127.0.0.1 19191 1 > /tmp/worker.log 2>&1 &
W1=$!
sleep 10
kill $MASTER_PID $W1 2>/dev/null
wait $MASTER_PID $W1 2>/dev/null
cat /tmp/master.log
echo ""=== WORKER LOG ===""
cat /tmp/worker.log
')
